title: Build a multi-agent system: A2A & Agent Registry
summary: Google Cloud presents Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol, a communication standard for agents analogous to HTTP, and Agent Registry, a discovery and governance system for managing agent sprawl. The tutorial demonstrates building a multi-agent system using Google's Agent Development Kit with synchronous and asynchronous communication patterns.
writeup: This tutorial introduces Google Cloud's Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol, a communication standard for agents framed as analogous to HTTP, alongside Agent Registry, a discovery and governance layer for managing agent sprawl. It walks through building a multi-agent system with Google's Agent Development Kit, covering both synchronous and asynchronous communication patterns. The takeaways are concrete: A2A standardizes how agents talk to each other, and Agent Registry handles discovery and governance as the number of agents grows.
